name: Login Template
response:
Login to Sravi Enterprises - Koda Connect

Hi,

Now, buying Sastry Balm is made easy with Koda Connect App. We help you connect with our Channel Partners in your location.

How Koda Connect Works:


Step 1Step 2Step 3
You place an Order on Koda AppSravi Enterprises will shortlist a Channel Partner from available Partners to fulfil your OrderChannel Partner handles Order Fulfilment



Your One Time Password (OTP) for login is:

[[otp]]

OTP expires in 5 minutes


Reach us on whatsapp if you are facing any issues: +918122586261
subject: Login to Sastry Balm Koda Connect

name: Order Notification for internal users

{{ cont.email_id or "" }}
{{ cont.mobile_no or cont.phone or "" }} {% else %} No contact provided {% endif %}
